description: Maps every guard token and every load-bearing action verb in transitions.json to a code anchor: a named function (asserted DEFINED via `^<name>\(\)` in the cited file) or a greppable predicate string (asserted PRESENT in the cited file). scripts/check-spec-drift.sh fails when (a) a transitions.json guard/action token has no entry here, or (b) a mapped anchor no longer resolves in its file (code drifted out from under the spec). Anchors key on function names and grep-stable literals — NEVER line numbers (line numbers drift on every edit). The `comment:*` action verbs are documentation-only (the posted comment text varies and is specified in state-machine.md / *-flow.md), so they are EXEMPT from a code anchor — the checker only requires they be the known `comment:` verb class. file paths are relative to skills/autonomous-dispatcher/scripts/.

only-autonomous-label.note: list_new_issues jq filter excludes any other state label.

concurrency-below-cap.name: count_active
concurrency-below-cap.note: Active count compared to MAX_CONCURRENT in dispatcher-tick.sh.

wrapper-exit-zero.note: cleanup() success branch keys on exit_code==0.

pr-exists-for-issue.name: fetch_pr_for_issue
pr-exists-for-issue.note: PR discovery by issue-ref in PR body.

no-pr-for-issue.name: fetch_pr_for_issue
no-pr-for-issue.note: Empty result of the same discovery.

pid-alive.name: pid_alive
pid-alive.note: Tiered liveness incl. SSM indeterminate (biases ALIVE).

pid-dead.name: pid_alive
pid-dead.note: DEAD = pid_alive miss; gated by INV-24 near-success+heartbeat.

ci-all-success.note: Step 5a requires all PR checks SUCCESS.

head-differs-from-reviewed.name: last_reviewed_head
head-differs-from-reviewed.note: Step 5b new-commits check vs Reviewed HEAD trailer (INV-04/07).

sigterm-wrapper-no-pr.note: SIGTERM trap; no-PR path routes pending-dev (INV-15).

verdict-fail-nonsubstantive.name: classify_recent_review_verdict
verdict-fail-nonsubstantive.note: INV-35 non-substantive cause (mergeable-unknown / e2e-evidence-missing / smoke-config-error / unavailable).

no-auto-close-absent.note: Same label read; absence allows auto-merge.

pr-merge-failed.note: gh pr merge returned non-zero → rebase re-dispatch (INV-33).

e2e-gate-fail.name: _classify_e2e_gate
e2e-gate-fail.note: INV-46: E2E lane rc≠0 before fan-out.

e2e-evidence-missing.name: _classify_e2e_gate
e2e-evidence-missing.note: INV-46: rc=0 but no SHA-matching evidence (transient).

smoke-config-error.name: _classify_smoke_gate
smoke-config-error.note: INV-64: pre-fan-out smoke FAIL = config error, stays reviewing.

bot-review-missing.note: INV-79: a mandatory configured REVIEW_BOTS review is still absent on the PR (fail-closed: a gh failure counts the bot as MISSING).

bot-review-wait-below-max.note: INV-79: the SHA-bound bot-review wait count is below BOT_REVIEW_WAIT_MAX → re-queue pending-review (non-substantive).

bot-review-wait-exceeded.note: INV-79: the SHA-bound bot-review wait count reached BOT_REVIEW_WAIT_MAX → substantive FAIL pending-dev (bot misconfigured/down).

pr-still-open.note: INV-54: hoisted PR-open guard, proceed branch.

result-not-parsed.note: Crash trap fires only when RESULT_PARSED=false.

still-reviewing.note: Step 5b confirms the issue still carries reviewing.

session-resumable.name: is_session_completed
session-resumable.note: INV-12: resume only against unfinished sessions.

review-flips-at-limit.note: INV-35: non-substantive flip count ≥ limit → stalled.

dev-no-progress-or-bot-unfixable.name: dev_report_bot_unfixable
dev-no-progress-or-bot-unfixable.note: INV-85: completed-session failed-substantive escalates to stalled when the PR HEAD is unchanged since the last review AND a prior dev-new already ran for it (no-progress, gated by the no-progress-substantive-attempt marker), OR the dev agent hit a PR-metadata 403 (dev_report_bot_unfixable). Bounded to one dev-new per HEAD.

terminal-with-transitional-residue.name: hygiene_strip_residual_labels
terminal-with-transitional-residue.note: INV-25: Step 0 hygiene strips residue on terminal issues.

sigterm-wrapper.note: Step 5a sends SIGTERM to the wrapper PID before relabel.
